title: BEM-591 fix reply intake yaml
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
wfs=Path('.github/workflows'); wfs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
triggers=Path('governance/triggers'); triggers.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
protocols=Path('governance/protocols'); protocols.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

protocol=protocols/'OPERATOR_REPLY_INTAKE_WORKFLOW_SAFE_YAML.md'
protocol.write_text('# BEM-591 | Operator Reply Intake Workflow Safe YAML'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-17 | 22:40 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Ошибка'+sep+sep+'`operator-reply-intake.yml` ломался на inline Python heredoc внутри YAML run block.'+sep+sep+'## Решение'+sep+sep+'Workflow больше не содержит heredoc/inline Python. Он только вызывает Telegram `getUpdates`, сохраняет JSON и передаёт его в `scripts/operator_reply_intake.py`.'+sep+sep+'## Результат'+sep+sep+'YAML должен проходить GitHub Actions validation. Парсинг и offset/seen логика остаются в Python parser.'+sep)

workflow=wfs/'operator-reply-intake.yml'
workflow.write_text('''name: Operator Reply Intake

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    paths:
      - 'governance/triggers/operator_reply_intake.trigger'
      - 'scripts/operator_reply_intake.py'
      - '.github/workflows/operator-reply-intake.yml'

permissions:
  contents: write

concurrency:
  group: operator-reply-intake
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  intake-operator-reply:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Syntax check reply intake
        run: python3 -m py_compile scripts/operator_reply_intake.py

      - name: Fetch Telegram updates
        env:
          TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          mkdir -p governance/tmp
          if [ -z "$TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN" ]; then
            echo "not_sent_missing_secret" > governance/tmp/operator_reply_status.txt
            echo '{"ok":false,"result":[]}' > governance/tmp/operator_reply_updates.json
          else
            HTTP_CODE=$(curl -sS -o governance/tmp/operator_reply_updates.json -w "%{http_code}" "https://api.telegram.org/bot${TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN}/getUpdates" || echo "000")
            echo "$HTTP_CODE" > governance/tmp/operator_reply_status.txt
          fi

      - name: Parse and record operator reply
        run: python3 scripts/operator_reply_intake.py

      - name: Commit intake result
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add governance/state/operator_reply_intake_state.json governance/operator_decisions governance/tasks/pending governance/transport/results.jsonl governance/reports/operator_reply_intake_result.md
          git commit -m "BEM-591 operator reply intake result" || echo "No changes"
          git pull --rebase origin main || git rebase --abort || true
          git push || (git pull --rebase origin main && git push)
''')

trigger=triggers/'operator_reply_intake.trigger'
trigger.write_text('BEM-591 trigger operator reply intake safe yaml at 2026-05-17 | 22:40 (UTC+3)'+sep)

report=reports/'bem591_fix_operator_reply_intake_yaml.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-591 | Fix Operator Reply Intake YAML | PASS'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-17 | 22:40 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'Removed inline Python heredoc from `operator-reply-intake.yml`. Workflow now fetches Telegram updates with curl only and delegates parsing to `scripts/operator_reply_intake.py`.'+sep+sep+'Blocker: null'+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem591_fix_operator_reply_intake_yaml','cycle_id':'bem591-fix-operator-reply-intake-yaml','source':'gpt','status':'completed','workflow':str(workflow),'trigger':str(trigger),'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 22:40 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except Exception: state={}
state['bem591_fix_operator_reply_intake_yaml']={'status':'completed','workflow':str(workflow),'issue':'removed_inline_python_heredoc','blocker':None}
state['updated_at']='2026-05-17 | 22:40 (UTC+3)'; state['blocker']=None
contour.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem591_fix_operator_reply_intake_yaml.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-591 PASS: operator-reply-intake.yml rewritten without inline Python heredoc and trigger marker updated.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(protocol),str(workflow),str(trigger),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Fixed operator-reply-intake.yml invalid YAML by removing inline Python heredoc and updating trigger marker')
"""
No issue comments.
